title: Bitcoin Immaculate Conception
description: Bitcoin's birth context is unusual: early digital currencies had little market value, Satoshi's identity was unknown, anyone with commodity hardware could mine, and faucet distribution made coins widely available. This origin story matters for understanding Bitcoin's perceived fairness and decentralization culture.

resources.title: Bitcoin v0.1 Announcement (2009)
